sentences.target: Je me ronge les ongles quand je stresse.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mə ʁɔ̃ʒ le zɔ̃ɡl kɑ̃ ʒə stʁɛs/

translations.fr: Je me ronge les ongles quand je stresse.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mə ʁɔ̃ʒ le zɔ̃ɡl kɑ̃ ʒə stʁɛs/
translations.en: I bite my nails when I'm stressed.
translations.es: Me muerdo las uñas cuando me estreso.
translations.de: Ich kaue an meinen Nägeln, wenn ich gestresst bin.
translations.it: Mi mangio le unghie quando sono stressato.
translations.pt: Eu roo as unhas quando fico estressado.
translations.vi: Tôi cắn móng tay khi bị căng thẳng.
translations.nl: Ik bijt op mijn nagels als ik gestrest ben.
translations.hu: Amikor ideges vagyok, rágom a körmeimet.
translations.hi: जब मैं तनाव में होता हूँ, तो मैं नाखून चबाता हूँ.
translations.el: Δαγκώνω τα νύχια μου όταν αγχώνομαι.
translations.nb: Jeg biter negler når jeg er stresset.
translations.sv: Jag biter på naglarna när jag är stressad.
translations.ro: Îmi rod unghiile când sunt stresat.
translations.cs: Koušu si nehty, když jsem ve stresu.
translations.da: Jeg bider negle, når jeg er stresset.
translations.ja: ストレスを感じると爪を噛んでしまう。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; head of the main clause's subject.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; marks pronominal construction with the verb ('se ronger les ongles').
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes the direct object 'les ongles'.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun 'ongles' as direct object.
Common noun, plural; complement (direct object) of 'ronge'.
Subordinating conjunction; introduces a temporal subordinate clause.
Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the subordinate clause.
Verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; predicate of the subordinate clause (colloquial intransitive use).

sentences.target: Le chien ronge son os dans le salon.
sentences.reading: /lə ʃjɛ̃ ʁɔ̃ʒ sɔ̃ ɔs dɑ̃ lə salɔ̃/

translations.fr: Le chien ronge son os dans le salon.
translations.ipa: /lə ʃjɛ̃ ʁɔ̃ʒ sɔ̃ ɔs dɑ̃ lə salɔ̃/
translations.en: The dog is gnawing his bone in the living room.
translations.es: El perro roe su hueso en la sala de estar.
translations.de: Der Hund nagt an seinem Knochen im Wohnzimmer.
translations.it: Il cane rosicchia il suo osso in salotto.
translations.ru: Собака грызёт свою кость в гостиной.
translations.pt: O cachorro está roendo seu osso na sala de estar.
translations.he: הכלב מכרסם את העצם שלו בסלון.
translations.vi: Con chó đang gặm xương trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: الكلب يقضم عظمه في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: De hond knaagt aan zijn bot in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Собака гризе свою кістку у вітальні.
translations.hu: A kutya a nappaliban rágja a csontját.
translations.hi: कुत्ता लिविंग रूम में अपनी हड्डी कुतर रहा है.
translations.pl: Pies obgryza swoją kość w salonie.
translations.el: Ο σκύλος ροκανίζει το κόκαλό του στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Hunden gnager på beinet sitt i stuen.
translations.id: Anjing itu sedang menggerogoti tulangnya di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Hunden gnager på sitt ben i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Câinele își roade osul în sufragerie.
translations.cs: Pes hlodá svou kost v obýváku.
translations.da: Hunden gnaver på sit ben i stuen.
translations.ja: 犬がリビングで骨をかじっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'chien' as subject.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'os' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'os' to indicate possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'ronge'.
Preposition; introduces the locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu ronges cette paille depuis une heure.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɔ̃ʒ sɛt paj dəpɥi yn œʁ/

translations.fr: Tu ronges cette paille depuis une heure.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɔ̃ʒ sɛt paj dəpɥi yn œʁ/
translations.en: You've been chewing that straw for an hour.
translations.es: Llevas una hora masticando esa pajita.
translations.de: Du kaust seit einer Stunde an diesem Strohhalm.
translations.it: Stai masticando quella cannuccia da un'ora.
translations.ko: 너 그 빨대를 한 시간째 씹고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你嚼那根吸管已经一个小时了。
translations.yue: 你嗰支飲管已經咬咗一個鐘頭。
translations.ru: Ты уже час жуёшь эту трубочку.
translations.pt: Você está mastigando esse canudo há uma hora.
translations.he: אתה לועס את הקשית הזאת כבר שעה.
translations.vi: Bạn nhai cái ống hút đó đã một giờ rồi.
translations.ar: أنت تمضغ قصبة الشرب هذه منذ ساعة.
translations.nl: Je zit al een uur op dat rietje te kauwen.
translations.uk: Ти вже годину жуєш цю трубочку.
translations.hu: Már egy órája rágod azt a szívószálat.
translations.hi: तुम उस स्ट्रॉ को एक घंटे से चबा रहे हो.
translations.pl: Żujesz tę słomkę już od godziny.
translations.el: Μασάς αυτό το καλαμάκι εδώ και μία ώρα.
translations.nb: Du har tygget på det sugerøret i en time.
translations.id: Kamu sudah sejam mengunyah sedotan itu.
translations.sv: Du har tuggat på det sugröret i en timme.
translations.ro: Mesteci paiul ăla de o oră.
translations.da: Du har tygget på det sugerør i en time.
translations.fi: Olet pureskellut sitä pilliä jo tunnin.
translations.ja: そのストローをもう1時間も噛んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes 'paille' as direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'paille'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ronges'.
Preposition; marks duration/starting point for the temporal complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'heure'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'depuis'.

translations.de: Hör auf, an diesem Bleistift zu kauen.
translations.vi: Đừng nhai cái bút chì đó nữa.
translations.ar: توقف عن قضم ذلك القلم الرصاص.
translations.nl: Stop met kauwen op dat potlood.
translations.hi: उस पेंसिल को चबाना बंद करो.
translations.el: Σταμάτα να μασάς αυτό το μολύβι.
translations.nb: Slutt å tygge på den blyanten.
translations.sv: Sluta tugga på den där blyertspennan.
translations.da: Stop med at tygge på den der blyant.
translations.ja: その鉛筆をかじるのはやめて。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, imperative mood, 2nd person singular; issues a command.
Preposition; introduces the infinitive complement ('de ronger').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'arrêter de'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'crayon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'ronger'.
